reasoning: Macro backdrop is decisively risk-on: overnight gap +$1.39, XLK +1.17%, XLF +1.23%, BULL ribbon 87¢ spread, ZERO macro events today. VIX at 19.43 (MID regime) is rising (+8.37%), which normally signals caution, but the absolute level remains below 22 (not HIGH). The overnight positive sentiment and sector strength outweigh the rising VIX warning. Elevated VIX direction keeps confidence moderate rather than strong, but premarket backdrop favors bullish directional entries with awareness that VIX divergence could trigger intraday weakness.
